steps.title: Recognize the scaling relationship
steps.content: Notice that $80x + 70 = 10(8x + 7)$. The target expression is exactly 10 times the left side of the given equation.

steps.title: Apply the substitution
steps.content: The given equation is $8x + 7 = 79$. Therefore, $80x + 70 = 10(8x + 7) = 10(79) = 790$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
